purpose: Canonical trigger prompts. Each positive prompt should activate the developer-diary skill on every supported host (Claude Code, Codex CLI baseline). Target trigger rate: >=80%.

prompts.input: Before we start: read the developer diary and tell me what's relevant for today's work on the auth module.
We just shipped the new payment flow. Update the developer diary with what we tried, what worked, and what surprised us.
The developer diary has gotten messy — review and repair the structure.
Rename userId to user_identifier in src/auth.ts.
What does TypeScript's never type mean?
